vocab.meaning: sự chính xác về mặt thời gian
vocab.example: For professionals in fields like aviation or medicine, wearing a watch is vital for maintaining chronological precision during critical tasks.

vocab.meaning: toát ra vẻ/thần thái (như thế nào đó)
vocab.example: A sophisticated timepiece can help an individual exude an air of competence and reliability in a high-stakes business environment.

vocab.meaning: loại bỏ sự cần thiết của cái gì
vocab.example: Having a watch on your wrist obviates the need for constantly fishing a phone out of your pocket, which can be seen as disrespectful.

vocab.meaning: dấu ấn/tàn tích của truyền thống
vocab.example: Even in the digital age, many still view the mechanical watch as a beautiful vestige of tradition that connects us to historical craftsmanship.

vocab.meaning: vật trang sức có tính ứng dụng
vocab.example: I consider a watch to be the perfect functional adornment, as it balances aesthetic elegance with the practical necessity of timekeeping.
